methods:
EXPERIMENT: 2026-04-14_IgG_PBMC-samples
date: 2026-04-14    analyte: IgG    category: immunoglobulins
CHI raw source: apr 14 26 PBMC  (mapping confidence: high)
------------------------------------------------------------------------

STANDARD PROTOCOL — Electrochemical sandwich immunoassay

  1. Capture antibody  — incubate the working electrode with capture antibody at
     10 ug/mL for 1 h at room temperature.
  2. Blocking          — 10 min in BSA blocking buffer.
  3. Sample / antigen  — apply sample (analyte standard or biological sample);
     incubate 1 h.
  4. Detection antibody— incubate with HRP-conjugated detection antibody at
     5 ug/mL for 1 h.
  5. Wash              — rinse to remove unbound reagents (PBS-T between steps).
  6. Readout           — add TMB-Ultra (enhanced TMB/H2O2 substrate); record the
     reduction current by chronoamperometry held at -0.2 V vs Ag/AgCl.

CONDITIONS FOR THIS EXPERIMENT (inferred from the title — verify):
  - Measured real biological samples (cell-culture supernatant / patient samples), not buffer-spiked standards.
  - Detection of IgG: anti-IgG capture antibody + HRP-labelled anti-IgG detection.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
